title: petasites frigidus var. frigidus
intro: Petasites frigidus var. frigidus, commonly known as coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to northern Europe, Asia, and North America, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and distinctive leaves that resemble a rosette. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Petasites frigidus var. frigidus include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Coltsfoot can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
